figures.caption: Fig. 2. Overview of the proposed layered control framework, consisting of a high-level ADMM-based CBF-DMPC for safety-critical trajectory planning, a mid-level NMPC layer enforcing the single rigid body (SRB) dynamics, and a low-level whole-body controller (WBC) enforcing full-order robot dynamics.

Fig. 4. Plot of the optimal state trajectory (x⋆,i, y⋆,i, θ⋆,i) generated by the high-level ADMM-based CBF-DMPC for agent 1, together with the corresponding reference trajectory toward its goal during experiment 2. The figure also depicts the optimal velocity commands (v⋆,i, ω⋆,i) and the minimum CBF values, representing obstacle-avoidance and inter-agent safety margins. The shaded regions indicate push intervals.
